text: I feel a curious pull in this modern, bright space, as if on the threshold of new ideas. The clean, glass-encased environment speaks of order and possibility. Entering the exhibit, 'R+D', my mind stirs with anticipation—this is a place that celebrates research and questioning. Screens flicker with concepts, inviting me to ponder how humans and machines shape one another. I feel energized and contemplative, ready to explore the interplay between technology and the human condition.
